name: OUTFRONT Media Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview OUTFRONT Media is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that provides advertising space (displays) on out-of-home advertising structures and sites in the United States (the U.S.), enabling advertisers to engage with audiences in high-impact in-real-life (IRL) moments and environments.
